data.title: Startup aims to lead digital transformation in $500 billion U.S. home repair industry, lagging in tech adoption.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on February 20, 2026, it was reported that the U.S. home repair and improvement industry, valued at almost $500 billion each year as per Harvard University's Joint Center for Housing Studies, has historically been slower in embracing digital technologies compared to other consumer sectors.

data.description: In Exeter, New Hampshire, on February 20, 2026, DiBona Dental Group revealed plans for its 50th-anniversary festivities scheduled for May 29th. The event commemorates fifty years of providing reliable dental care to families within the New Hampshire Seacoast region. data.title: New book by Richard S. Andrews & Emilee Simmons helps cultural organizations create social impact. Released on Feb 20, 2026.
data.description: The recent release of a book by Richard S. Andrews and Emilee Simmons aims to equip cultural leaders with vital tools and resources to create a beneficial social impact. The authors made this announcement in Chicago on Feb. 20, 2026. This book provides essential guidance for cultural leaders looking to make a positive difference in their communities.

data.title: National Life Group names Jenora Haynes as 2025-2026 LifeChanger of the Year grand prize winner.
data.description: In Addison, Texas, National Life Group revealed that Jenora Haynes has been selected as the grand prize winner of the 2025-2026 National Life Group LifeChanger of the Year award.

data.title: Medifast's OPTAVIA system offers metabolic health benefits, allowing HSA/FSA clients to save up to 40% on program costs.
data.description: In Baltimore, Medifast (NYSE: MED) has introduced OPTAVIA's metabolic health system for reimbursement through specific insurance plans with Health Savings Accounts (HSA) and Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA). This initiative aims to enhance metabolic health. OPTAVIA clients have the potential to reduce program costs by up to 40% by coordinating with their healthcare provider and insurance supervisor to utilize pre-tax medical funds. This opportunity provides increased accessibility.

data.title: ACR Poker's Super Series XL in March features $50M guarantees, $5M in main events, $3.2M in multi-flight events.
data.description: ACR Poker is set to host their largest tournament series featuring three Monster Main Events boasting a total guaranteed prize pool of $5 million. In addition, there will be $3.2 million in guaranteed prizes offered in Multi-Flight Events. Following the success of the Dual Venom tournaments that awarded over $11 million, this event is anticipated to attract a large number of poker enthusiasts. This tournament extravaganza is scheduled to take place in San Jose, Costa Rica starting on February 20, 2026.

data.title: National Police Association backs Lawless Cities Accountability Act of 2025, targeting officials hindering law enforcement efforts.
data.description: In Indianapolis on February 20, 2026, it was reported that state and local authorities accused of hindering law enforcement in controlling rampant violence have failed the citizens they represent. Such administrations, by acting in this manner, disregard the safety of law-abiding individuals and neglect their responsibilities.

data.title: US Q4 GDP growth slows to 1.4%, below expected 3%. Fed's inflation rate rises unexpectedly. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The United States' gross domestic product saw a 1.4% increase in the fourth quarter of 2025, as per initial estimates from the Bureau of Economic Analysis. This growth rate represents a significant decrease from the previous quarter's 4.4% expansion rate and falls well below the anticipated 3% growth projected by economists. The figures were not in line with expectations. For further details, please refer to the complete article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HASI prices $400M offering of green senior unsecured notes due 2036, with a 6.000% interest rate.
data.description: Annapolis-based HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HASI) revealed the pricing of their registered public offering on February 19, 2026. The offering consists of $400 million in total of 6.000% green senior unsecured notes due 2036. The Notes will be secured by Hannon Armstrong Sustainable Infrastructure, L.P., and Hannon Armstrong.

data.title: Standard Motor Products will report Q4 & FY 2025 earnings on Feb 26, 2026, for the period ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP), a prominent automotive parts maker and supplier, announced plans to disclose its financial results for the three-month and twelve-month period concluding on December 31, 2025. The report is set to be released before the market opens on February 26, 2026.

data.title: KBRA study analyzes 455,000 loans worth $292.3 billion from 2010-2025 prime RMBS transactions, examining loan attributes' impact on credit outcomes.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has published a prime Residential Mortgage-Backed Securities (RMBS) default study. The study analyzes more than 455,000 loans totaling $292.3 billion in original balance from about 640 prime transactions issued from 2010 to 2025. The report delves into the performance dynamics of various loan attributes such as vintage, combined loan-to-value (CLTV) ratio, credit score, occupancy, loan purpose, product type, and borrower reserves. It investigates the influence of multiple risk factors on credit outcomes. Some notable findings from the study include:

data.title: Nucor promotes Jack Sullivan to CFO, Treasurer, and EVP. Effective Feb 20, 2026. #Nucor #NYSE #CFO
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 20, 2026, Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) revealed the promotion of John L. "Jack" Sullivan. Formerly serving as Vice President, Treasurer, and General Manager of Investor Relations, Sullivan will now take on the roles of Chief Financial Officer, Treasurer, and Executive Vice President. This strategic move showcases Nucor's commitment to internal talent development and positions Sullivan to take on broader financial responsibilities within the company.

data.title: ParaZero receives another order of DefendAir C-UAS system from Israeli defense, building trust in innovative interception tech.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), a leading aerospace defense company specializing in autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS), revealed that they have secured a new order from another division within an Israeli defense organization for their DefendAir™ multi-layered Counter-UAS (C-UAS) solution. This fresh order follows a previous successful deployment earlier in the year with the same defense entity, showcasing a burgeoning reliance on ParaZero’s cutting-edge net-based interception technology.
